overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a rain-soaked, post-apocalyptic urban street at night. The scene features abandoned vehicles, ruined concrete buildings, and heavy rainfall, rendered in a video game engine with a dark, desaturated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined post-apocalyptic city street with abandoned vehicles

events.description: rusted abandoned sedan on left passes out of view behind camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the rain-soaked street toward the red truck ahead

entered.detail: derelict car with rusted orange body parked on the left side of the street
large red delivery truck blocking the center of the road ahead
ruined multi-story concrete building with broken windows and debris
weathered brick building with fire escapes and boarded windows
sagging electrical wires stretching across the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rain-swept post-apocalyptic street. A rusted abandoned sedan sits on the left while a red box truck blocks the path ahead. The camera moves forward through heavy rain, passing the derelict car as ruined buildings loom on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined post-apocalyptic city street approaching obstacle

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the rain, approaching the red truck blocking the road

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the ruined street, the abandoned car recedes behind as the red truck grows larger in the center of the frame. The rain continues to fall heavily, reducing visibility of the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined post-apocalyptic city street passing vehicle obstacle

events.description: camera veers slightly left to pass the red truck, which shifts to the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: navigating around the left side of the red truck blocking the road

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and begins to pass the red box truck, moving along its left side. The truck shifts from the center to the right of the frame as the camera navigates past the obstacle, with the ruined building facade now filling the right side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked urban wasteland, transitioning from an open street toward a narrow passage beside a derelict vehicle. It begins by gliding past a rusted abandoned sedan on the left, with ruined buildings looming over the dark, rain-swept road. As the camera pushes deeper into the gloom, the heavy rainfall obscures the distant skyline while a red box truck gradually grows larger and more dominant in the center of the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera navigates around the obstacle, moving along the left side of the truck until the vehicle slides to the right, leaving the weathered facade of a ruined building to fill the view.
